Package com.nib.commons

Class Context

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.Context
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BatchContext, SupernautContext
public class Context extends Object implements AutoCloseable

    • trace

      public void trace(String format, Object... args)
      Logs a trace message at the INFO level. The message includes the current program stack size, program name, and the formatted message.
      Parameters:
      format - the format string for the message
      args - the arguments to be formatted into the message

    • traceWarning

      public void traceWarning(String format, Object... args)
      Logs a warning message at the ERROR level. The message includes the current program stack size, program name, and the formatted message.
      Parameters:
      format - the format string for the message
      args - the arguments to be formatted into the message
